name: G-Synth Reflex POC
postCreateCommand: cd reflex_poc && pip install --upgrade pip && pip install -r requirements.txt && reflex init --template blank

postAttachCommand.reflex: cd reflex_poc && nohup reflex run --frontend-port 3000 --backend-port 8000 > /tmp/reflex.log 2>&1 & echo 'Reflex starting in the background. First compile takes 2-4 min. Tail the log with: tail -f /tmp/reflex.log'
